For that hard to get to client that you've been calling for the last six or seven months and will not return your phone call, try this. Go to the local phone store AT&T, Sprint, whoever you get your phone service from and purchase a prepaid cell phone. Okay? Prepaid cell phone, I think it'll cost you seven, eight, nine dollars and I want you to send it to the client, mail it to the client with a note telling them when you will be calling them on this phone on a specific day at a specific time because you have some very, very important information to share with them. Tell me how this works for you.
